From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Genus of moths

| *Dicymolomia* | |
| --- | --- |
|  | |
| *[Dicymolomia julianalis](/wiki/Dicymolomia_julianalis "Dicymolomia julianalis")* | |
| [Scientific classification](/wiki/Taxonomy_(biology) "Taxonomy (biology)") [Edit this classification](/wiki/Template:Taxonomy/Dicymolomia "Edit this classification") | |
| Kingdom: | [Animalia](/wiki/Animal "Animal") |
| Phylum: | [Arthropoda](/wiki/Arthropod "Arthropod") |
| Class: | [Insecta](/wiki/Insect "Insect") |
| Order: | [Lepidoptera](/wiki/Lepidoptera "Lepidoptera") |
| Family: | [Crambidae](/wiki/Crambidae "Crambidae") |
| Subfamily: | [Glaphyriinae](/wiki/Glaphyriinae "Glaphyriinae") |
| Genus: | *Dicymolomia* [Zeller](/wiki/Philipp_Christoph_Zeller "Philipp Christoph Zeller"), 1872[[1]](#cite_note-1) |

***Dicymolomia*** is a [genus](/wiki/Genus "Genus") of [moths](/wiki/Moth "Moth") of the family [Crambidae](/wiki/Crambidae "Crambidae").

## Species

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Dicymolomia&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Species")]

* *[Dicymolomia diminutalis](/wiki/Dicymolomia_diminutalis "Dicymolomia diminutalis")*
* *[Dicymolomia grisea](/wiki/Dicymolomia_grisea "Dicymolomia grisea")*
* *[Dicymolomia julianalis](/wiki/Dicymolomia_julianalis "Dicymolomia julianalis")* (Walker, 1859)
* *[Dicymolomia metalliferalis](/wiki/Dicymolomia_metalliferalis "Dicymolomia metalliferalis")* (Packard, 1873)
* *[Dicymolomia metalophota](/wiki/Dicymolomia_metalophota "Dicymolomia metalophota")* (Hampson, 1897)
* *[Dicymolomia micropunctalis](/wiki/Dicymolomia_micropunctalis "Dicymolomia micropunctalis")*
* *[Dicymolomia opuntialis](/wiki/Dicymolomia_opuntialis "Dicymolomia opuntialis")*
* *[Dicymolomia rufifusalis](/wiki/Dicymolomia_rufifusalis "Dicymolomia rufifusalis")* (Hampson, 1912)
